CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-04-2019 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-26-2018 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Apr-09-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion Of Defendant, Adam J. Jacobs, D.C. To Compel Plaintiff'S Attorney, Cutter Law, P.C. And Attorney John Parker, Jr. To Pay The Court Reporter Fee For Non-Appearance Of Plaintiff, Heather Marshall, At Her Noticed Deposition Of April 10, 2018 And For Monetary Sanctions Against Cutter Law, P.C. And John Parker, Jr.
Off Calendar Oct-19-2018 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT ADAM JACOBS' Motion To Compel Plaintiff'S Attorney, Cutter Law, P.C. And Attorney John Parker, Jr. To Pay The Court Reporter Fee For Non-Appearance Of Plaintiff, Heather Marshall, At Her Noticed Deposition Of April 10, 2018 And For Monetary Sanctions Against Cutter Law, P.C. And John Parker, Jr.

DENIED. Defendant was aware well in advance of the noticed deposition that plaintiff did not intend to appear on the date noticed by defendant. There was no reason to incur this expense under those circumstances. Additionally, there was no showing that alternate dates were discussed/ if defendant has been unable to negotiate a new date it could have than filed a motion to compel. No monetary sanctions will be imposed. Prevailing party to submit form of order whcih repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and that complies with CRC 3.1312 to Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne by email at rennepar85@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne; Clerk: William Trupek; Not reported. (302/JPT)
